creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->patched

Vuxml entry is done, 

but your backport patch rejected here: 

===>  Extracting for nagios-2.12_2 
=> MD5 Checksum OK for nagios-2.12.tar.gz. 
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for nagios-2.12.tar.gz. 
===>   nagios-2.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - found 
===>  Patching for nagios-2.12_2 
===>   nagios-2.12_2 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - found 
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for nagios-2.12_2 
3 out of 9 hunks failed--saving rejects to cgi/cmd.c.rej 
=> Patch patch-CVE-2008-5027.5028 failed to apply cleanly. 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/net-mgmt/nagios2. 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/net-mgmt/nagios2 


I think we should mark FORBIDDEN and DEPRECATED, nagios2 isn't 
longer suppored by upstream.
